headline: Telecom Stocks: What SpaceX IPO Filing Revealed About Starlink's Big Ambitions
summary: Starlink faces hurdles turning into a hybrid satellite-terrestrial wireless network operator. The SpaceX IPO has pressured telecom stocks.

headline: T-Mobile Customers Get the Best Experience on the New motorola razr Lineup
summary: BELLEVUE, Wash., May 21, 2026--What’s the news: Today, T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) announced the next era of Motorola’s iconic razr lineup — motorola razr, motorola razr+ and motorola razr fold — is coming to T-Mobile with on Us offers including T-Mobile’s best device offer yet. And the all-new motorola razr fold with 6Rx and 5G Advanced technologies can deliver up to 20% faster download speeds for more reliable streaming and downloads, all on America’s Best Network.
